0.original: 1. 2 00:00:02,080 --> 00:00:03,650 Be an activationist. 3 00:00:03,841 --> 00:00:05,730 Be someone who does things. 4 00:00:05,920 --> 00:00:08,451 Be a doer, not a don'ter. 5 00:00:09,440 --> 00:00:10,051 2. 6 00:00:10,321 --> 00:00:12,931 Don't wait until conditions are perfect. 7 00:00:13,040 --> 00:00:14,371 They never will be. 8 00:00:14,640 --> 00:00:19,891 Expect future obstacles and difficulties, and solve them as they arise. 9 00:00:20,080 --> 00:00:21,571 3. 10 00:00:21,761 --> 00:00:25,331 Remember, ideas alone won't bring success. 11 00:00:25,600 --> 00:00:29,170 Ideas have value only when you act upon them. 12 00:00:30,400 --> 00:00:34,851 Four, use action to cure fear and gain confidence. 13 00:00:35,040 --> 00:00:38,051 Do what you fear and fear disappears. 14 00:00:38,160 --> 00:00:39,891 Just try it and see. 15 00:00:41,040 --> 00:00:44,770 Five, start your mental engine mechanically. 16 00:00:44,880 --> 00:00:47,331 Don't wait for the spirit to move you. 17 00:00:47,520 --> 00:00:51,491 Take action, dig in, and you move the spirit. 18 00:00:51,491 --> 00:00:53,331 6. 19 00:00:53,680 --> 00:00:55,650 Think in terms of now. 20 00:00:55,920 --> 00:01:02,851 Tomorrow, next week, later, and similar words often are synonymous with the failure word, never. 21 00:01:03,200 --> 00:01:07,011 Be an, I'm starting right now, kind of person. 22 00:01:07,011 --> 00:01:08,690 7. 23 00:01:08,880 --> 00:01:11,250 Get down to business, pronto. 24 00:01:11,281 --> 00:01:13,730 Don't waste time getting ready to act. 25 00:01:13,841 --> 00:01:15,730 Start acting instead. 26 00:01:16,720 --> 00:01:17,331 8. 27 00:01:17,520 --> 00:01:19,011 Seize the initiative. 28 00:01:19,120 --> 00:01:20,451 Be a crusader. 29 00:01:20,560 --> 00:01:22,291 Pick up the ball and run. 30 00:01:22,480 --> 00:01:23,730 Be a volunteer. 31 00:01:24,000 --> 00:01:27,650 Show that you have ability and ambition to do. 32 00:01:28,720 --> 00:01:31,491 Get in gear and go.
0.b1: 1. Be someone who takes action. Be a person who gets things done. Be a doer, not someone who makes excuses. 2. Do not wait for the perfect moment. It will never come. Expect problems and solve them when they happen. 3. Remember, ideas alone do not lead to success. Ideas are only valuable when you act on them. 4. Use action to overcome fear and build confidence. Do what you are afraid of, and the fear will go away. Just try it. 5. Start your work even if you do not feel like it. Do not wait for motivation. Start working, and you will find your motivation. 6. Think about the present. Words like 'tomorrow' or 'later' often mean 'never.' Be the kind of person who starts right now. 7. Get to work immediately. Do not waste time preparing. Start doing it now. 8. Take the first step. Be a leader. Take responsibility and move forward. Volunteer for tasks. Show that you have the skill and the drive to succeed. Start moving now.
0.cn: 1. 做一个行动派。做一个做事的人。做一个行动者，而不是一个空谈者。2. 不要等到条件完美才开始。因为完美时刻永远不会到来。预见未来的障碍并随时解决它们。3. 记住，光有想法不会带来成功。只有当你付诸行动时，想法才有价值。4. 用行动来治愈恐惧并获得自信。去做你害怕的事，恐惧就会消失。试一试就知道了。5. 机械地启动你的思维引擎。不要等待灵感降临。投入行动，深入其中，你就会产生动力。6. 活在当下。明天、下周、以后，这些词往往和失败的代名词“永远不”意思一样。做一个“我现在就开始”的人。7. 马上开始工作。不要浪费时间在准备上。直接开始行动吧。8. 掌握主动权。做一个积极的开拓者。拿起球就跑。做一个志愿者。展现出你的能力和抱负。行动起来吧。
0.ai_notes:
'activationist': a person who believes in taking immediate action rather than just thinking or planning.
'doer': a person who acts rather than merely talking or thinking.
'don'ter': a playful, invented word for someone who avoids action or makes excuses not to do things.
'as they arise': when problems happen or appear.
'act upon': to take action based on an idea or suggestion.
'mental engine': a metaphor for your brain's ability to start working or focusing.
'spirit to move you': waiting for a feeling of motivation or inspiration before starting a task.
'dig in': to start working hard or to become fully involved in a task.
'synonymous': having the same or a very similar meaning.
'get down to business': to start working seriously or focus on the main task.
'pronto': an informal way to say quickly or immediately.
'seize the initiative': to take the first step or lead in a situation without waiting for others.
'crusader': a person who campaigns vigorously for a cause or takes a bold lead.
'pick up the ball and run': an idiom from sports meaning to take responsibility for a task and move forward with it independently.
'get in gear': to start working efficiently or to prepare to move forward.
0.remarks:
'activationist': 指倾向于立即采取行动而非仅仅思考或计划的人。
'doer': 指付诸行动而非空谈或空想的人。
'don'ter': 一个戏谑的自造词，指那些逃避行动或找借口不做事的人。
'as they arise': 当问题发生或出现时。
'act upon': 根据某个想法或建议采取行动。
'mental engine': 比喻大脑开始工作或专注的能力。
'spirit to move you': 指在开始任务前等待动力或灵感的感觉。
'dig in': 开始努力工作或全身心投入某项任务。
'synonymous': 意思相同或非常相似。
'get down to business': 开始认真工作或专注于主要任务。
'pronto': 非正式表达，意为迅速地或立即。
'seize the initiative': 不等待他人，主动采取第一步或占据主导地位。
'crusader': 指为某项事业积极奔走或大胆带头的人。
'pick up the ball and run': 源自体育的习语，意为承担任务并独立推进。
'get in gear': 开始高效工作或准备好向前推进。
